method: Pinned rootless Docker environment, static source compilation, bundled-synthetic-data load, and tokenizer/JEPA encoder forward smoke
observation: The official repository compiled and its bundled synthetic dataset (1400 x 512 x 28), tokenizer, and temporal encoder executed successfully in the network-disabled sandbox. The paper's central reported evaluations could not be reproduced because the Massive.com market dataset, trained checkpoints, and complete evaluation pipeline are not included.
limitations: This confirms executable model/data paths, not the reported empirical metrics or full claim set. The available data are synthetic noise rather than the proprietary market data described by the paper.
